name: action-envelope-origin-absent
description: ActionEnvelope with no origin (server-originated): the `origin` field is required-nullable (T | undefined). When absent from the wire input it MUST re-encode absent — key omitted, never null. This fixture is the regression gate for the Rust serialization bug where `Option::is_none` was not skipped, causing `"origin": null` to be emitted instead of the key being omitted.
